classes.reasoning: The document is explicitly titled 'CLINICAL TRIAL PROTOCOL' and 'CLINICAL STUDY PROTOCOL' on the cover page. It includes comprehensive protocol elements such as sponsor information, trial code (35RC17_8844_VIRTUOSE), detailed methodology, inclusion/exclusion criteria, visit schedules, statistical analysis plans, and regulatory approvals (CPP and ANSM authorization).

sponsor_name: CHU de Rennes (Rennes University Hospital Centre)
trial_title: VIRTUOSE: Efficiency of sildenafil on the absolute claudication distance of peripheral arterial disease patients with intermittent claudication. A phase III, National, Multicenter, Prospective, Randomized, Double-blind, Placebo-Controlled trial
intervention: Sildenafil citrate 140 mg/day (sildenafil citrate base 100 mg/day)
indication: Peripheral arterial disease with intermittent claudication
summary: This is Version 10.0 (dated 26/06/2025) of a phase III clinical study protocol for the VIRTUOSE trial. The study evaluates the efficacy of sildenafil compared to placebo in improving walking capacity in patients with peripheral arterial disease and intermittent claudication. This is a national, multicenter, prospective, randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial sponsored by CHU de Rennes. The primary endpoint is the absolute change in absolute claudication distance from baseline to week 24 measured by treadmill walking test.
references_to: CPP approval dated 12/10/2020 by Committee for the Protection of Persons Ile-de-France 8 of Boulogne-Billancourt
ANSM authorization dated 07/12/2020, Authorization no.: MEDAECNAT-2020-12-00001
